+@preconcurrency import AVFoundation
+import AppKit
+import AudioToolbox
+import CoreAudio
+import SwiftUI
+
+struct OnboardingAudioInputDevice: Identifiable, Equatable, Sendable {
+    let id: String
+    let name: String
+}
+
+protocol AudioInputDeviceListing: Sendable {
+    func inputDevices() -> [OnboardingAudioInputDevice]
+    func preferredInputDeviceID() -> String?
+}
+
+struct CoreAudioInputDeviceCatalog: AudioInputDeviceListing {
+    func inputDevices() -> [OnboardingAudioInputDevice] {
+        audioInputDeviceIDs().compactMap { deviceID in
+            guard let name = deviceName(for: deviceID) else {
+                return nil
+            }
+
+            return OnboardingAudioInputDevice(
+                id: String(deviceID),
+                name: name
+            )
+        }
+    }
+
+    func preferredInputDeviceID() -> String? {
+        guard let defaultDeviceID = defaultInputDeviceID() else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return String(defaultDeviceID)
+    }
+
+    private func audioInputDeviceIDs() -> [AudioDeviceID] {
+        var address = AudioObjectPropertyAddress(
+            mSelector: kAudioHardwarePropertyDevices,
+            mScope: kAudioObjectPropertyScopeGlobal,
+            mElement: kAudioObjectPropertyElementMain
+        )
+        guard let devices: [AudioDeviceID] = propertyValue(
+            objectID: AudioObjectID(kAudioObjectSystemObject),
+            address: &address
+        ) else {
+            return []
+        }
+
+        return devices.filter(hasInputChannels(_:))
+    }
+
+    private func defaultInputDeviceID() -> AudioDeviceID? {
+        var address = AudioObjectPropertyAddress(
+            mSelector: kAudioHardwarePropertyDefaultInputDevice,
+            mScope: kAudioObjectPropertyScopeGlobal,
+            mElement: kAudioObjectPropertyElementMain
+        )
+        return propertyValue(
+            objectID: AudioObjectID(kAudioObjectSystemObject),
+            address: &address
+        )
+    }
+
+    private func hasInputChannels(_ deviceID: AudioDeviceID) -> Bool {
+        var address = AudioObjectPropertyAddress(
+            mSelector: kAudioDevicePropertyStreamConfiguration,
+            mScope: kAudioDevicePropertyScopeInput,
+            mElement: kAudioObjectPropertyElementMain
+        )
+        guard let bufferList: AudioBufferList = propertyValue(objectID: deviceID, address: &address) else {
+            return false
+        }
+
+        let bufferCount = Int(bufferList.mNumberBuffers)
+        let buffers = Array(
+            UnsafeBufferPointer(
+                start: withUnsafePointer(to: bufferList.mBuffers) {
+                    UnsafeRawPointer($0).assumingMemoryBound(to: AudioBuffer.self)
+                },
+                count: bufferCount
+            )
+        )
+
+        return buffers.contains { $0.mNumberChannels > 0 }
+    }
+
+    private func deviceName(for deviceID: AudioDeviceID) -> String? {
+        var address = AudioObjectPropertyAddress(
+            mSelector: kAudioObjectPropertyName,
+            mScope: kAudioObjectPropertyScopeGlobal,
+            mElement: kAudioObjectPropertyElementMain
+        )
+        return propertyValue(objectID: deviceID, address: &address)
+    }
+
+    private func propertyValue<T>(
+        objectID: AudioObjectID,
+        address: inout AudioObjectPropertyAddress
+    ) -> T? {
+        var dataSize: UInt32 = 0
+        let sizeStatus = AudioObjectGetPropertyDataSize(objectID, &address, 0, nil, &dataSize)
+        guard sizeStatus == noErr else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        let capacity = Int(dataSize)
+        let pointer = UnsafeMutableRawPointer.allocate(
+            byteCount: capacity,
+            alignment: MemoryLayout<T>.alignment
+        )
+        defer {
+            pointer.deallocate()
+        }
+
+        var mutableSize = dataSize
+        let dataStatus = AudioObjectGetPropertyData(objectID, &address, 0, nil, &mutableSize, pointer)
+        guard dataStatus == noErr else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return pointer.assumingMemoryBound(to: T.self).pointee
+    }
+}

+@MainActor
+protocol MicrophoneLevelMonitoring: AnyObject {
+    var onLevelChange: (@MainActor (Double) -> Void)? { get set }
+
+    func start(deviceID: String?) throws
+    func stop()
+}
+
+@MainActor
+final class LiveMicrophoneLevelMonitor: MicrophoneLevelMonitoring, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var onLevelChange: (@MainActor (Double) -> Void)?
+
+    private let engine = AVAudioEngine()
+    private var activeDeviceID: String?
+
+    func start(deviceID: String?) throws {
+        let targetDeviceID = deviceID ?? activeDeviceID
+        guard targetDeviceID != activeDeviceID || !engine.isRunning else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        stop()
+
+        if let targetDeviceID {
+            try configureInputDevice(targetDeviceID)
+        }
+
+        let inputNode = engine.inputNode
+        let inputFormat = inputNode.inputFormat(forBus: 0)
+        inputNode.installTap(onBus: 0, bufferSize: 1024, format: inputFormat) { [weak self] buffer, _ in
+            self?.publishLevel(from: buffer)
+        }
+        engine.prepare()
+        try engine.start()
+        activeDeviceID = targetDeviceID
+    }
+
+    func stop() {
+        engine.inputNode.removeTap(onBus: 0)
+        engine.stop()
+        activeDeviceID = nil
+        onLevelChange?(0)
+    }
+
+    private func configureInputDevice(_ deviceID: String) throws {
+        guard let coreAudioDeviceID = coreAudioDeviceID(from: deviceID) else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        var mutableDeviceID = coreAudioDeviceID
+        let status = AudioUnitSetProperty(
+            engine.inputNode.audioUnit!,
+            kAudioOutputUnitProperty_CurrentDevice,
+            kAudioUnitScope_Global,
+            0,
+            &mutableDeviceID,
+            UInt32(MemoryLayout<AudioDeviceID>.size)
+        )
+        guard status == noErr else {
+            throw NSError(
+                domain: NSOSStatusErrorDomain,
+                code: Int(status),
+                userInfo: [NSLocalizedDescriptionKey: "Failed to start microphone level monitor."]
+            )
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func publishLevel(from buffer: AVAudioPCMBuffer) {
+        guard let channelData = buffer.floatChannelData?.pointee, buffer.frameLength > 0 else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let frameLength = Int(buffer.frameLength)
+        let samples = UnsafeBufferPointer(start: channelData, count: frameLength)
+        let meanSquare = samples.reduce(0.0) { partialResult, sample in
+            partialResult + (Double(sample) * Double(sample))
+        } / Double(frameLength)
+        let rms = sqrt(meanSquare)
+        let normalized = min(1.0, max(0.0, rms * 10.0))
+
+        Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
+            self?.onLevelChange?(normalized)
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+private func coreAudioDeviceID(from stringValue: String) -> AudioDeviceID? {
+    guard let rawValue = UInt32(stringValue) else {
+        return nil
+    }
+
+    return AudioDeviceID(rawValue)
+}

+protocol OnboardingRelaunchScheduling: Sendable {
+    func scheduleRelaunch(after delay: Duration)
+}
+
+struct ShellOnboardingRelaunchScheduler: OnboardingRelaunchScheduling {
+    func scheduleRelaunch(after delay: Duration) {
+        guard ProcessInfo.processInfo.environment["XCTestConfigurationFilePath"] == nil else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        let delaySeconds = max(1, Int(delay.components.seconds))
+        let bundlePath = ShellOnboardingRelaunchScheduler.shellQuoted(Bundle.main.bundleURL.path)
+        let process = Process()
+        process.executableURL = URL(fileURLWithPath: "/bin/sh")
+        process.arguments = ["-c", "sleep \(delaySeconds); open \(bundlePath)"]
+        try? process.run()
+    }
+
+    private static func shellQuoted(_ string: String) -> String {
+        "'" + string.replacingOccurrences(of: "'", with: "'\\''") + "'"
+    }
+}
+
+enum OnboardingStep: Equatable {
+    case welcome
+    case setup
+    case tryIt
+    case done
+}
+
+struct OnboardingModelRow: Identifiable, Equatable {
+    let id: String
+    let title: String
+    let subtitle: String
+    let status: String
+}
+
+@MainActor
+final class OnboardingFlowController: ObservableObject {
+    @Published private(set) var step: OnboardingStep = .welcome
+    @Published private(set) var microphoneStatus: AVAuthorizationStatus
+    @Published private(set) var accessibilityGranted = false
+    @Published private(set) var screenRecordingGranted = false
+    @Published private(set) var inputDevices: [OnboardingAudioInputDevice] = []
+    @Published private(set) var selectedInputDeviceID: String?
+    @Published private(set) var microphoneLevel: Double = 0
+    @Published private(set) var modelRows: [OnboardingModelRow] = []
+    @Published private(set) var modelProgress: Double?
+    @Published private(set) var isModelRetryVisible = false
+    @Published private(set) var tryItErrorMessage: String?
+    @Published private(set) var tryItSuccessMessage: String?
+    @Published private(set) var tryItTranscript: String?
+    @Published private(set) var isTryItRecording = false
+
+    private let settingsStore: SettingsStore
+    private let speechModelManager: SpeechModelManager
+    private let cleanupModelManager: any CleanupModelManaging
+    private let microphonePermission: any MicrophonePermissionControlling
+    private let accessibilityPermission: any AccessibilityPermissionChecking
+    private let screenRecordingPermission: any ScreenRecordingPermissionControlling
+    private let systemSettingsOpener: any SystemSettingsOpening
+    private let relaunchScheduler: any OnboardingRelaunchScheduling
+    private let audioInputDeviceCatalog: any AudioInputDeviceListing
+    private let levelMonitor: any MicrophoneLevelMonitoring
+    private let makeTryItHotkeyMonitor: @MainActor () -> any HotkeyMonitoring
+    private let makeTryItAudioRecorder: @MainActor () -> any AudioRecording
+    private let speechTranscriber: any SpeechTranscribing
+    private let sleep: @MainActor (Duration) async -> Void
+    private let onComplete: @MainActor @Sendable (Bool) -> Void
+
+    private var setupPollingTask: Task<Void, Never>?
+    private var tryItStartupTask: Task<Void, Never>?
+    private var tryItAdvanceTask: Task<Void, Never>?
+    private var monitoredDeviceID: String?
+    private var hasAutoAdvancedTryIt = false
+    private var activeTryItHotkeyMonitor: (any HotkeyMonitoring)?
+    private var activeTryItRecorder: (any AudioRecording)?
+
+    init(
+        settingsStore: SettingsStore,
+        speechModelManager: SpeechModelManager,
+        cleanupModelManager: any CleanupModelManaging,
+        microphonePermission: any MicrophonePermissionControlling,
+        accessibilityPermission: any AccessibilityPermissionChecking,
+        screenRecordingPermission: any ScreenRecordingPermissionControlling,
+        systemSettingsOpener: any SystemSettingsOpening,
+        relaunchScheduler: any OnboardingRelaunchScheduling = ShellOnboardingRelaunchScheduler(),
+        audioInputDeviceCatalog: any AudioInputDeviceListing = CoreAudioInputDeviceCatalog(),
+        levelMonitor: any MicrophoneLevelMonitoring = LiveMicrophoneLevelMonitor(),
+        makeTryItHotkeyMonitor: @escaping @MainActor () -> any HotkeyMonitoring = { GlobalHotkeyMonitor() },
+        makeTryItAudioRecorder: @escaping @MainActor () -> any AudioRecording = { LiveAudioRecorder() },
+        speechTranscriber: any SpeechTranscribing,
+        sleep: @escaping @MainActor (Duration) async -> Void = { duration in
+            try? await Task.sleep(for: duration)
+        },
+        onComplete: @escaping @MainActor @Sendable (Bool) -> Void
+    ) {
+        self.settingsStore = settingsStore
+        self.speechModelManager = speechModelManager
+        self.cleanupModelManager = cleanupModelManager
+        self.microphonePermission = microphonePermission
+        self.accessibilityPermission = accessibilityPermission
+        self.screenRecordingPermission = screenRecordingPermission
+        self.systemSettingsOpener = systemSettingsOpener
+        self.relaunchScheduler = relaunchScheduler
+        self.audioInputDeviceCatalog = audioInputDeviceCatalog
+        self.levelMonitor = levelMonitor
+        self.makeTryItHotkeyMonitor = makeTryItHotkeyMonitor
+        self.makeTryItAudioRecorder = makeTryItAudioRecorder
+        self.speechTranscriber = speechTranscriber
+        self.sleep = sleep
+        self.onComplete = onComplete
+        microphoneStatus = microphonePermission.authorizationStatus()
+        levelMonitor.onLevelChange = { [weak self] level in
+            self?.microphoneLevel = level
+        }
+        syncModelState()
+    }
+
+    var microphoneGranted: Bool {
+        microphoneStatus == .authorized
+    }
+
+    var canContinueFromSetup: Bool {
+        microphoneGranted && accessibilityGranted && modelsReady
+    }
+
+    var microphoneButtonTitle: String {
+        switch microphoneStatus {
+        case .authorized:
+            return ""
+        case .denied, .restricted:
+            return "Open Settings"
+        case .notDetermined:
+            return "Grant"
+        @unknown default:
+            return "Grant"
+        }
+    }
+
+    var modelsReady: Bool {
+        speechModelManager.phase == .ready &&
+            (!settingsStore.cleanupEnabled || cleanupModelManager.phase == .ready)
+    }
+
+    func advanceFromWelcome() {
+        step = .setup
+    }
+
+    func handleSetupAppear() {
+        refreshSetupState()
+        startSetupPolling()
+        loadModelsIfNeeded(force: false)
+    }
+
+    func handleSetupDisappear() {
+        setupPollingTask?.cancel()
+        setupPollingTask = nil
+        stopLevelMonitor()
+    }
+
+    func performMicrophoneAction() async {
+        if microphoneButtonTitle == "Open Settings" {
+            systemSettingsOpener.open(.microphone)
+            return
+        }
+
+        _ = await microphonePermission.ensureAccess()
+        refreshSetupState()
+    }
+
+    func requestAccessibilityAccess() {
+        _ = accessibilityPermission.isTrusted(prompt: true)
+        refreshSetupState()
+    }
+
+    func enableScreenRecording() {
+        relaunchScheduler.scheduleRelaunch(after: .seconds(3))
+        _ = screenRecordingPermission.requestAccess()
+        systemSettingsOpener.open(.screenRecording)
+        refreshSetupState()
+    }
+
+    func retryModelLoading() {
+        loadModelsIfNeeded(force: true)
+    }
+
+    func selectInputDevice(id: String) {
+        guard inputDevices.contains(where: { $0.id == id }) else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        selectedInputDeviceID = id
+        restartLevelMonitorIfNeeded(force: true)
+    }
+
+    func proceedFromSetup() {
+        handleSetupDisappear()
+        step = .tryIt
+    }
+
+    func proceedFromSetupForTesting() {
+        step = .tryIt
+    }
+
+    func handleTryItAppear() {
+        hasAutoAdvancedTryIt = false
+        tryItErrorMessage = nil
+        tryItSuccessMessage = nil
+        tryItTranscript = nil
+        isTryItRecording = false
+        activeTryItHotkeyMonitor = makeTryItHotkeyMonitor()
+        startTryItMonitor()
+    }
+
+    func handleTryItDisappear() {
+        tryItStartupTask?.cancel()
+        tryItStartupTask = nil
+        tryItAdvanceTask?.cancel()
+        tryItAdvanceTask = nil
+        activeTryItHotkeyMonitor?.stop()
+        activeTryItHotkeyMonitor = nil
+        activeTryItRecorder = nil
+        isTryItRecording = false
+    }
+
+    func skipTryIt() {
+        handleTryItDisappear()
+        step = .done
+    }
+
+    func continueFromTryIt() {
+        skipTryIt()
+    }
+
+    func finishOnboarding() {
+        onComplete(true)
+    }
+
+    private func startSetupPolling() {
+        setupPollingTask?.cancel()
+        setupPollingTask = Task { [weak self] in
+            while let self, !Task.isCancelled {
+                await self.sleep(.seconds(2))
+                guard !Task.isCancelled else {
+                    return
+                }
+
+                self.refreshSetupState()
+                if self.accessibilityGranted && self.screenRecordingGranted {
+                    return
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func refreshSetupState() {
+        microphoneStatus = microphonePermission.authorizationStatus()
+        accessibilityGranted = accessibilityPermission.isTrusted(prompt: false)
+        screenRecordingGranted = screenRecordingPermission.refresh() == .granted
+        syncInputDevices()
+        syncModelState()
+    }
+
+    private func syncInputDevices() {
+        guard microphoneGranted else {
+            inputDevices = []
+            selectedInputDeviceID = nil
+            stopLevelMonitor()
+            return
+        }
+
+        let devices = audioInputDeviceCatalog.inputDevices()
+        inputDevices = devices
+
+        let fallbackDeviceID = audioInputDeviceCatalog.preferredInputDeviceID() ?? devices.first?.id
+        if let selectedInputDeviceID, devices.contains(where: { $0.id == selectedInputDeviceID }) {
+            restartLevelMonitorIfNeeded(force: false)
+            return
+        }
+
+        selectedInputDeviceID = fallbackDeviceID
+        restartLevelMonitorIfNeeded(force: true)
+    }
+
+    private func restartLevelMonitorIfNeeded(force: Bool) {
+        let targetDeviceID = selectedInputDeviceID
+        guard force || monitoredDeviceID != targetDeviceID else {
+            return
+        }
+
+        stopLevelMonitor()
+
+        do {
+            try levelMonitor.start(deviceID: targetDeviceID)
+            monitoredDeviceID = targetDeviceID
+        } catch {
+            monitoredDeviceID = nil
+            microphoneLevel = 0
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func stopLevelMonitor() {
+        levelMonitor.stop()
+        monitoredDeviceID = nil
+        microphoneLevel = 0
+    }
+
+    private func loadModelsIfNeeded(force: Bool) {
+        let shouldLoadSpeech = force || speechModelManager.phase != .ready
+        if shouldLoadSpeech {
+            Task { [weak self] in
+                guard let self else {
+                    return
+                }
+
+                await self.speechModelManager.load(modelID: self.settingsStore.speechModelID)
+                self.syncModelState()
+            }
+        }
+
+        let shouldLoadCleanup = settingsStore.cleanupEnabled && (force || cleanupModelManager.phase != .ready)
+        if shouldLoadCleanup {
+            Task { [weak self] in
+                guard let self else {
+                    return
+                }
+
+                await self.cleanupModelManager.load(modelID: self.settingsStore.selectedCleanupModelKind)
+                self.syncModelState()
+            }
+        } else {
+            syncModelState()
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func syncModelState() {
+        let speechModel = SpeechModelDescriptor.catalogEntry(id: settingsStore.speechModelID) ?? .default
+        var rows = [
+            OnboardingModelRow(
+                id: "speech",
+                title: "Speech Model",
+                subtitle: "\(speechModel.title) (\(speechModel.variantLabel))",
+                status: speechModelStatus()
+            )
+        ]
+
+        if settingsStore.cleanupEnabled {
+            let cleanupModel = CleanupModelDescriptor.catalogEntry(id: settingsStore.selectedCleanupModelKind) ?? .default
+            rows.append(
+                OnboardingModelRow(
+                    id: "cleanup",
+                    title: "Cleanup Model",
+                    subtitle: "\(cleanupModel.parameterCountLabel) (\(cleanupModel.approximateSizeLabel))",
+                    status: cleanupModelStatus()
+                )
+            )
+        }
+
+        modelRows = rows
+        modelProgress = combinedModelProgress()
+        isModelRetryVisible = speechModelManager.phase == .error || cleanupModelManager.phase == .error
+    }
+
+    private func speechModelStatus() -> String {
+        if speechModelManager.phase == .ready {
+            return "Ready"
+        }
+        if let errorMessage = speechModelManager.errorMessage {
+            return errorMessage
+        }
+        if let progress = speechModelManager.downloadProgress {
+            return "Downloading \(Int(progress * 100))%"
+        }
+        if speechModelManager.phase == .loading {
+            return "Loading"
+        }
+        return "Waiting"
+    }
+
+    private func cleanupModelStatus() -> String {
+        if cleanupModelManager.phase == .ready {
+            return "Ready"
+        }
+        if let errorMessage = cleanupModelManager.errorMessage {
+            return errorMessage
+        }
+        if let progress = cleanupModelManager.downloadProgress {
+            return "Downloading \(Int(progress * 100))%"
+        }
+        if cleanupModelManager.phase == .loading || cleanupModelManager.phase == .downloading {
+            return "Loading"
+        }
+        return "Waiting"
+    }
+
+    private func combinedModelProgress() -> Double? {
+        let progressValues = [speechModelManager.downloadProgress, cleanupModelManager.downloadProgress]
+            .compactMap { $0 }
+        guard !progressValues.isEmpty else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return progressValues.reduce(0, +) / Double(progressValues.count)
+    }
+
+    private func startTryItMonitor() {
+        tryItStartupTask?.cancel()
+        tryItStartupTask = Task { [weak self] in
+            guard let self, let hotkeyMonitor = self.activeTryItHotkeyMonitor else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            for attempt in 0..<5 {
+                do {
+                    try hotkeyMonitor.start(bindings: .defaultBindings) { [weak self] effect in
+                        self?.handleTryItEffect(effect)
+                    }
+                    self.tryItErrorMessage = nil
+                    return
+                } catch {
+                    guard attempt < 4 else {
+                        self.tryItErrorMessage =
+                            "Could not start hotkey monitor. Please verify Accessibility is enabled in System Settings."
+                        return
+                    }
+                    await self.sleep(.seconds(2))
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func handleTryItEffect(_ effect: HotkeyEffect) {
+        Task { @MainActor [weak self] in
+            await self?.processTryItEffect(effect)
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func processTryItEffect(_ effect: HotkeyEffect) async {
+        switch effect {
+        case .start:
+            guard !isTryItRecording else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            let recorder = makeTryItAudioRecorder()
+            do {
+                try recorder.startRecording { _ in
+                }
+                activeTryItRecorder = recorder
+                isTryItRecording = true
+            } catch {
+                tryItErrorMessage = error.localizedDescription
+            }
+        case .stop:
+            guard let recorder = activeTryItRecorder, recorder.isRecording else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            isTryItRecording = false
+            let samples = await recorder.stopRecording()
+            let transcription = await speechTranscriber.transcribe(
+                samples: samples,
+                modelID: settingsStore.speechModelID
+            )
+            guard let transcription, !transcription.isEmpty else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            tryItTranscript = transcription
+            tryItSuccessMessage = "It works! Your words will be pasted wherever your cursor is."
+            scheduleTryItAdvance()
+        case .restart:
+            break
+        }
+    }
+
+    private func scheduleTryItAdvance() {
+        tryItAdvanceTask?.cancel()
+        tryItAdvanceTask = Task { [weak self] in
+            guard let self else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            await self.sleep(.seconds(2))
+            guard !self.hasAutoAdvancedTryIt else {
+                return
+            }
+
+            self.hasAutoAdvancedTryIt = true
+            self.skipTryIt()
+        }
+    }
+}

+struct OnboardingFlowView: View {
+    @StateObject private var controller: OnboardingFlowController
+
+    init(controller: OnboardingFlowController) {
+        _controller = StateObject(wrappedValue: controller)
+    }
+
+    var body: some View {
+        VStack(spacing: 0) {
+            switch controller.step {
+            case .welcome:
+                welcomeStep
+            case .setup:
+                setupStep
+            case .tryIt:
+                tryItStep
+            case .done:
+                doneStep
+            }
+        }
+        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
+        .background(
+            LinearGradient(
+                colors: [
+                    Color(nsColor: .windowBackgroundColor),
+                    Color.orange.opacity(0.08)
+                ],
+                startPoint: .top,
+                endPoint: .bottom
+            )
+        )
+    }

+import AVFoundation

+    func testSetupAppearLoadsDevicesStartsMeterAndBeginsModelLoading() async {

+        let relaunchScheduler = OnboardingRelaunchScheduler()
+        let inputDevices = OnboardingInputDeviceCatalog(
+            devices: [
+                OnboardingAudioInputDevice(id: "built-in", name: "Built-in Microphone"),
+                OnboardingAudioInputDevice(id: "usb", name: "USB Mic")
+            ],
+            defaultInputDeviceID: "built-in"
+        )
+        let levelMonitor = OnboardingMicrophoneLevelMonitor()
+        let controller = OnboardingFlowController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: speechModelManager,
+            cleanupModelManager: cleanupManager,
+            microphonePermission: microphonePermission,
+            accessibilityPermission: accessibilityPermission,
+            screenRecordingPermission: screenRecordingPermission,
+            systemSettingsOpener: settingsOpener,
+            relaunchScheduler: relaunchScheduler,
+            audioInputDeviceCatalog: inputDevices,
+            levelMonitor: levelMonitor,
+            makeTryItHotkeyMonitor: { OnboardingTryItHotkeyMonitor() },
+            makeTryItAudioRecorder: { OnboardingTryItAudioRecorder() },
+            speechTranscriber: OnboardingSpeechTranscriber(),
+            sleep: { _ in
+                await Task.yield()
+            }
+        ) { _ in
+        }
+
+        controller.advanceFromWelcome()
+        controller.handleSetupAppear()
+        await waitUntil {
+            controller.canContinueFromSetup
+        }
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.step, .setup)
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.inputDevices.map(\.id), ["built-in", "usb"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(controller.selectedInputDeviceID, "built-in")
+        XCTAssertEqual(levelMonitor.startCallDeviceIDs, ["built-in"])

+        controller.handleSetupDisappear()

+    private func settingsStore() -> SettingsStore {
+        let suiteName = "OnboardingFlowTests-\(UUID().uuidString)"
+        let userDefaults = UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)!
+        userDefaults.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+        addTeardownBlock {
+            UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)?.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+        }
+        return SettingsStore(userDefaults: userDefaults)
+    }

+    private func waitUntil(
+        timeout: Duration = .seconds(1),
+        condition: @escaping @MainActor () -> Bool

+        let deadline = ContinuousClock.now + timeout
+        while !condition() {
+            XCTAssertLessThan(ContinuousClock.now, deadline)
+            await Task.yield()
+        }
+    }

+private final class OnboardingSpeechModelLoader: SpeechModelLoading {
+    private(set) var calls: [String] = []
+
+    func isCached(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor) async throws -> Bool {
+        calls.append("isCached:\(model.id)")
+        return false
+    }
+
+    func download(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, progress: @escaping @Sendable (Double) -> Void) async throws {
+        calls.append("download:\(model.id)")
+        progress(1.0)
+    }
+
+    func load(_ model: SpeechModelDescriptor, whisperOptions: WhisperRuntimeOptions) async throws {
+        calls.append("load:\(model.id)")
+    }
+
+    func resetLoadedModels() async {
+    }
+}
+
+@MainActor
+private final class OnboardingCleanupModelManager: CleanupModelManaging {
+    var phase: CleanupModelManager.Phase = .idle
+    var errorMessage: String?
+    var downloadProgress: Double?
+    var loadedModelID: String?
+    var cachedModelIDs: Set<String> = []
+    private(set) var loadCallIDs: [String] = []
+
+    func load(modelID: String?) async {
+        let resolvedModelID = modelID ?? SettingsStore.defaultCleanupModelKind
+        loadCallIDs.append(resolvedModelID)
+        loadedModelID = resolvedModelID
+        cachedModelIDs.insert(resolvedModelID)
+        phase = .ready
+    }
+
+    func refreshCachedModelIDs() async {
+    }
+
+    func shutdown() async {
+    }
+}

+private struct OnboardingMicrophonePermission: MicrophonePermissionControlling {
+    var status: AVAuthorizationStatus
+    var ensureAccessResult: Bool
+
+    func authorizationStatus() -> AVAuthorizationStatus {
+        status
+    }
+
+    func ensureAccess() async -> Bool {
+        ensureAccessResult
+    }
+}
+
+private struct OnboardingAccessibilityPermission: AccessibilityPermissionChecking {
+    let isTrusted: Bool
+
+    func isTrusted(prompt: Bool) -> Bool {
+        _ = prompt
+        return isTrusted
+    }
+}
+
+private final class OnboardingScreenRecordingPermission: ScreenRecordingPermissionControlling, @unchecked Sendable {
+    private(set) var state: ScreenRecordingPermissionState
+    private(set) var requestAccessCallCount = 0
+
+    init(initialState: ScreenRecordingPermissionState) {
+        state = initialState
+    }
+
+    func refresh() -> ScreenRecordingPermissionState {
+        state
+    }
+
+    func requestAccess() -> ScreenRecordingPermissionState {
+        requestAccessCallCount += 1
+        return state
+    }
+}

+@MainActor

+    private(set) var startCallDeviceIDs: [String?] = []
+    private(set) var stopCallCount = 0
+
+    func start(deviceID: String?) throws {
+        startCallDeviceIDs.append(deviceID)
+        onLevelChange?(0.42)
+    }
+
+    func stop() {
+        stopCallCount += 1
+        onLevelChange?(0)

+
+private final class OnboardingTryItHotkeyMonitor: HotkeyMonitoring, @unchecked Sendable {
+    var isRunning = false
+    var startErrorSequence: [Error] = []
+    private(set) var startCallCount = 0
+    var effectHandler: HotkeyEffectHandler?
+
+    func start(bindings: HotkeyBindings, effectHandler: @escaping HotkeyEffectHandler) throws {
+        _ = bindings
+        startCallCount += 1
+        if !startErrorSequence.isEmpty {
+            throw startErrorSequence.removeFirst()
+        }
+        isRunning = true
+        self.effectHandler = effectHandler
+    }
+
+    func suspend() {
+    }
+

+    }
+
+    func stop() {
+        isRunning = false

+    }

+

+        isRecording = true
+    }

+        stopCallCount += 1
+        isRecording = false
+        return samplesToReturn
+    }

+    private(set) var calls: [Call] = []
+

+        calls.append(Call(samples: samples, modelID: modelID ?? ""))
+        return result
+    }
+}
